basics.name: Jordan Beaumont
basics.label: Three-time Founder, currently exploring
basics.summary: Three-time founder across devtools, fintech infrastructure, and consumer mobile. Two acquisitions (one announced, one undisclosed), one wound down. Currently exploring senior IC roles at later-stage companies where I can stop wearing the CEO hat and go deep on product engineering again.

highlights.summary: Workflow orchestration for ML teams. Acquired by Mosaic Compute (April 2025, undisclosed). YC W22. Grew to 14 people and $4.2M ARR.
Embedded payments API for SaaS platforms. Acquired by a publicly-traded fintech in Q4 2021 ($38M reported). Built initial team from 2 to 28.
Consumer audio sharing app. Reached 80k MAU, raised a $750k pre-seed, ultimately wound down after failing to find sustainable retention. Returned remaining capital to investors.

work.summary: ML workflow orchestration platform. YC W22. Acquired by Mosaic Compute April 2025.
highlights: Built and led 14-person fully-remote team across 8 countries
Grew from $0 to $4.2M ARR in 24 months; gross margin >78%
Raised $9M seed (Accel led) and a $14M Series A (Index led)
Architected the core scheduler in Rust; personally shipped ~40% of initial codebase
Negotiated and closed the Mosaic acquisition; integration completed Q3 2025

work.summary: Embedded payments API for B2B SaaS. Acquired Q4 2021 for $38M.
highlights: Hired and led engineering org from 0 to 18 engineers across 4 squads
Designed PCI-DSS Level 1 architecture; passed audit in year 2
Processed $2.1B in lifetime payment volume across 1,200 SaaS customers

work.summary: Consumer audio sharing app. Wound down honourably; capital returned to investors.
highlights: Reached 80k MAU and #4 on App Store Music Discovery
Built entire iOS + Android + backend stack solo for first 18 months
Engineer #11. Built early ledger and card-issuing services in Go.
On-call rotation for the founding banking license launch.

projects.name: rust-actor-bench
projects.description: Benchmark suite comparing Rust actor frameworks under realistic workloads.

publications.name: What I learned founding three startups in a decade
How we ran a 14-person fully-remote engineering org

intentions.summary: After three founder runs (2 acquisitions, 1 wind-down), I'm explicitly looking for a senior IC engineering role at a Series C or later company — no co-founder, no early-stage CTO, no advisory-for-equity. I want to ship code, mentor, and not run a P&L for a few years.

desiredRange.notes: Public equity or late-stage liquid equity strongly preferred over early-stage paper.

outreachControls.responseSLA: I read everything; I reply within 5 business days to messages that meet the minimum viable offer.

provenance.notes: Hand-written and hand-edited by the candidate. No AI generation used for any field in this document.
